title: The missing men of the American marriage market
description: A new study suggests the growing educational and economic divide between men and women is reshaping marriage and family life in America — leaving many women with a shrinking pool of economically stable partners.

title: Steep drop in number of people with Affordable Care Act health coverage, analysis finds
description: Enrollment in Healthcare.gov and the other marketplaces is plunging by 5 million, the new paper from KFF finds. Last year, Congress failed to make a deal to keep the coverage more affordable.

title: House holds off on prediction market ban despite bipartisan calls for prohibition
description: Minority Leader Jeffries is urging Speaker Johnson to "swiftly" hold vote on House prediction market ban.

title: What we know about how the U.S. government uses spyware (and what we don't)
description: Critics of spyware, which can be used to remotely hack into phones, worry the Trump administration is eroding policies that stigmatized the commercial spyware industry.

title: 'We're not kids anymore': The DACA generation hits their 30s with an unstable future
description: Recipients of the Obama-era DACA program are aging, even as the Trump administration moves to weaken the program's protections and benefits.

title: These men voted for President Trump. They have very different views of how he's doing
description: Two Black men from Georgia who voted for President Trump in 2024 have very different views of how the country is doing now, in the first installment of Swing Shift from NPR's Tamara Keith.

title: In conservative Utah, some communities are ditching fossil fuel power for clean energy
description: In conservative Utah, a coalition of cities and towns shows other communities how to bring new renewable energy to the electric grid in a unique way.

title: Kentucky Rep. Thomas Massie faces a tough primary challenge
description: Kentucky Rep. Thomas Massie has been a thorn in the side of President Trump, who is backing Massie's primary challenger, making Tuesday's primary high stakes for both prominent Republicans.

title: Six states hold primaries on Tuesday, testing Trump's influence
description: Six states hold primaries on Tuesday, with key races continuing to serve as a test of President Trump's influence on the Republican Party and voters.

title: What the Kentucky and Georgia primaries could tells us about the midterm elections
description: Conservative political consultant and pollster Sarah Longwell talks about the Kentucky and Georgia primaries and what the results might portend for the midterm elections.

title: The Republican senators speaking out against Trump
description: Sen. Bill Cassidy joins a short but notable list

title: GOP senator who voted to convict Trump in impeachment trial loses primary
description: Sen. Bill Cassidy of Louisiana failed to make the runoff in his GOP Senate primary five years after his vote to convict Donald Trump, which led the president to call for his ouster.
